examples: On Christmas Eve in 1994, humans entered a cave in the mountains of southeastern France for what was probably the first time in 20,000 years.
Research now indicates that sizable areas of southeastern Alaska along the inner continental shelf were not covered by ice toward the end of the last Ice Age.
This phenomenon was not necessarily confined to the Pleistocene, but may have occurred much earlier in the Southeastern Asian islands, although evidence is fragmentary.
In searching for the silver lining, Southeastern drew particular attention to the increasingly profitable enterprise business.
He also joked about members of the Southeastern Conference not knowing how to read or write.
